name: 安装并配置 Trae IDE
description: 安装 Trae IDE 桌面客户端，并配置 localmodel 与 Volcano Engine Coding Plan 两个大模型。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
INSTALL_METHOD="{{install_method}}"
VERSION="{{version}}"
CONFIGURE_MODELS="{{configure_models}}"
WORKSPACE_DIR="{{workspace_dir}}"

LOCALMODEL_BASE_URL="{{localmodel_base_url}}"
LOCALMODEL_API_KEY="{{localmodel_api_key}}"
LOCALMODEL_MODEL="{{localmodel_model}}"

VOLCANO_BASE_URL="{{volcano_base_url}}"
VOLCANO_API_KEY="{{volcano_api_key}}"
VOLCANO_MODEL="{{volcano_model}}"

if [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "apt" ]]; then
  echo "Installing Trae IDE via apt..."
  mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
  curl -fsSL https://archive.trae.io/linux/gpg.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/trae.gpg
  chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/trae.gpg
  echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/trae.gpg] https://archive.trae.io/linux stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/trae.list
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y trae
  hash -r
elif [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "deb-url" ]]; then
  echo "Installing Trae IDE from deb URL: $VERSION"
  curl -fsSL "$VERSION" -o /tmp/trae.deb
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y /tmp/trae.deb
  rm -f /tmp/trae.deb
  hash -r
elif [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "skip" ]]; then
  echo "Skipping Trae IDE installation."
else
  echo "ERROR: unsupported install_method=$INSTALL_METHOD" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "$CONFIGURE_MODELS" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "Skipping Trae model configuration because configure_models=false."
  exit 0
fi

CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/.config/trae/User"
mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR"

python3 - "$CONFIG_DIR" "$LOCALMODEL_BASE_URL" "$LOCALMODEL_API_KEY" "$LOCALMODEL_MODEL" "$VOLCANO_BASE_URL" "$VOLCANO_API_KEY" "$VOLCANO_MODEL" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

config_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
local_base = sys.argv[2]
local_key = sys.argv[3]
local_model = sys.argv[4]
volcano_base = sys.argv[5]
volcano_key = sys.argv[6]
volcano_model = sys.argv[7]

settings_path = config_dir / "settings.json"
if settings_path.exists():
    try:
        settings = json.loads(settings_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        settings = {}
else:
    settings = {}

providers = settings.setdefault("trae.modelProviders", {}).setdefault("openai", [])

local_provider = {
    "id": "localmodel",
    "name": "localmodel",
    "baseUrl": local_base,
    "model": local_model,
}
if local_key:
    local_provider["apiKey"] = local_key

volcano_provider = {
    "id": "volcano-coding-plan",
    "name": "Volcano Engine Coding Plan",
    "baseUrl": volcano_base,
    "model": volcano_model,
}
if volcano_key:
    volcano_provider["apiKey"] = volcano_key

def replace_or_append(items, item):
    for i, existing in enumerate(items):
        if existing.get("id") == item["id"]:
            items[i] = item
            return
    items.append(item)

replace_or_append(providers, local_provider)
replace_or_append(providers, volcano_provider)

settings["trae"] = settings.get("trae", {})
settings["trae"]["selectedModel"] = settings["trae"].get("selectedModel") or local_model
settings["trae"]["selectedProvider"] = settings["trae"].get("selectedProvider") or "localmodel"

settings_path.write_text(json.dumps(settings, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
settings_path.chmod(0o600)
print(f"Trae model configuration written to {settings_path}")
PY

echo "Trae IDE setup complete."

volcano_base_url.label: Volcano Engine Coding Plan Base URL
